title: Leiotulus aureus
intro: Leiotulus aureus, also known as Golden Dust Bush, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Leiotulus aureus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Leiotulus aureus is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits.
